examples: She would walk on to the beach and watch the night fishermen trawl the shallow waters.
A quick trawl through the newspapers yielded five suitable job adverts.
Statisticians trawl through the vast quantities of data these surveys produce rather as miners panning for gold.
There is some evidence that firms are having to trawl more widely to fill their boardrooms.
To trawl the document, make sure you're in GUI mode and type a forward slash.
